document.title: Network Operations Modeling Expectations for TSPs, REs, and QSEs

submission_channels.source_excerpt: Transmission Service Providers (TSPs) will submit changes directly into the NMMS using NOMCRs.
Resource Entities (REs) will submit their model changes in the Resource Asset Registration Form (RARF).
Qualified Scheduling Entities (QSEs) will submit telemetry changes ... using service requests (SRs) in Siebel.

rarf_rules.source_excerpt: RARF submissions failing to pass RARF validation will be rejected.

interim_update_rules.source_excerpt: NOMCRs/CAMRs outside normal timelines are Interim Updates and included if needed for specific corrections/restoration; at ERCOT discretion.

contingency_rules.source_excerpt: MP is expected to manage the contingency component flag such that the correct contingency can be built.
